final:
module top_full_adder_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input cin,
    output reg sum,
    output reg cout);always @(*) begin
        {cout, sum} <= a + b + cin;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      sum <= ~a & ~b & ~cin;
      cout <= a | b | cin;
    end
  end

endmodule
